design_concept: Premium Dark AI SaaS (Linear/Vercel/Cursor inspired). Focus on high-contrast, minimal gradients, 1px subtle strokes, and dark glassmorphism. It should feel like a command center for elite engineers.

rules: BANNED: Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, Space Grotesk for headings. Only use Outfit for headings to maintain a premium tech feel.
Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny (text-xs) + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]) using JetBrains Mono.
Hierarchy gap rule: Jump between heading and subheading must not exceed 2 Tailwind steps.
NEVER use pure #000000 or #808080. Always use the designated Near Black #0B0F19.
Layered elevation via background lightness shifts instead of heavy shadows. Use border-white/5 or border-white/10 to define edges.
One saturated accent color in a desaturated system for clear focal points.

visual_enhancers.the_tracing_beam: High-conversion cards (like the active onboarding step) should have a dynamic glowing border or a solid 1px accent border.
visual_enhancers.neumorphism_tactile: For small action buttons: mix soft shadows with sharp inner contrasts, sharp 1px border to ground it.

grids_and_layouts.dashboard: High Density Grid (Mode B). Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap: gap-6. Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on children.
grids_and_layouts.onboarding_wizard: Centered floating glass card. Progress indicators using sleek horizontal bars or step nodes. Dark overlays (bg-black/50) behind modals.
grids_and_layouts.sidebar: Sleek glass look. 250px fixed width on desktop. Collapsible on mobile. Active states should use the primary color with 10% opacity background.
grids_and_layouts.spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing. Containers with borders must have padding (p-6 or p-8).

components.buttons: Slightly rounded (rounded-lg or rounded-xl). Interaction animations required (hover:bg-opacity-90 active:scale-95). Only use primary color for main CTA. Secondary buttons should be transparent with 1px border.
components.cards: Dark Glassmorphism. bg-[#131825] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl hover:border-white/15 transition-colors.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-transparent.
components.ai_assistant_panel: Collapsible docked panel on the right side. Must feel like a premium command center. Use backdrop blur and separate it with a 1px border-l border-white/10.
components.cmd_k_palette: Global search UI, glassmorphic overlay, quick actions with mono font shortcuts.
rules: Use Shadcn UI for forms, inputs, selects, dialogs, dropdowns.
All interactive elements MUST include 'data-testid' attribute.
Micro-animations on hover states, transitions, entrance animations.
Transition effects: use specific properties (transition-all is banned). transition-transform, transition-opacity, transition-colors.
Staggered entrance animations for lists (like the activity timeline).
Focus states MUST have HIGHER contrast.
Normal text: Min 4.5:1 contrast. Large text: 3:1.

auth_background.description: Abstract dark background with purple geometric design for auth pages.

tech_pattern.description: Dark and white minimal tech background pattern.

profile_avatar_1.description: Tech professional portrait for user profile.

profile_avatar_2.description: Tech professional portrait for user profile.

instructions_to_main_agent: You have .js files not .tsx files. Write your React components using JavaScript (.js/.jsx).
Implement the Layout shell with Sidebar, Header (Cmd+K + Global Search), and docked AI Assistant panel.
Build standard Auth flow (Register, Login, Forgot/Reset Password).

Build 'Mission Initialization' Onboarding wizard (7 steps: welcome, choose target companies, current position, daily study hours slider, self-assessment sliders, interview target date picker, animated Mission Initialization progress screen).
Build 'Mission Control' Dashboard with 7 bento-grid placeholder widgets (Today's Mission, Interview Readiness, Study Streak, Upcoming Revision, Knowledge Progress, Recent Activity, Notifications).
Build Settings page (Profile, Theme, Study Hours, Target Companies, AI Configuration with provider dropdown/Gemini API Key/Model/Temperature, Notification Preferences).
Include 'data-testid' attributes in all interactive/important UI elements.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. Always add transitions for specific properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
NEVER use placeholder URLs. Use the provided image_urls.
